headline: AppLovin gains e-commerce ad share as advertisers expand platform use, Jefferies survey finds
summary: AppLovin Corp (NASDAQ:APP) is gaining share of e-commerce advertising budgets as brands increase spending on the platform, according to a Jefferies survey of advertisers using the company’s advertising technology in the second quarter of 2026. Jefferies surveyed 30 e-commerce and web...

headline: AppLovin (APP) Has Set The Bar High. Can It Deliver Good Earnings Again?
summary: AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the 10 Best AI Stocks to Watch in July. Based on a report released on July 1, Clark Lampen, an analyst at BTIG, reaffirmed a Buy rating on AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) along with a price target of $640. The firm’s assigned price target reflects a further 17% upside from […]
